trends.name: Muted Pastels
trends.description: Desaturated pastel palettes that feel modern and approachable.
trends.usage: Backgrounds, cards, and section dividers for a soft aesthetic.

trends.name: Vibrant Gradients
trends.description: Bold multi-color gradients used as backgrounds and accents.
trends.usage: Hero backgrounds, CTAs, and brand identity elements.

trends.name: Dark Mode Neutrals
trends.description: Refined dark palette with carefully elevated surface colors.
trends.usage: Dark theme backgrounds, surfaces, and borders.

trends.name: Monochromatic with Accent
trends.description: Grayscale or single-hue palette with one bold accent color.
trends.usage: Clean interfaces where the accent color carries all the visual weight.

trends.name: Nature-Inspired
trends.description: Warm earth tones and organic color palettes.
